channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Intel’s already working on its 3rd-gen Celestial GPUs – but we’re still waiting for discrete 2nd-gen Battlemage graphics cards
item.description: Celestial, or Xe3, will debut in Panther Lake laptop chips next year, and work is already underway to support it in Linux.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The IRS is rolling out its free tax-filing tool to 30 million Americans—and surprisingly, it’s great
item.description: Some 30 million Americans across the country will have a new way to file their taxes next spring: Direct File, a tool developed by the Internal Revenue Service that allows users to prepare their taxes and file online completely free of charge and without the need for any third-party provider.
item.dc:creator: Bryce Covert, Fast Company

item.title: Lesser-known xargs command is a versatile time saver
item.description: The xargs command may be one that many Linux users don’t know, but it’s also one that can save a lot of time and trouble on the command line. It’s an unusual command with some very handy uses.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Elon Musk unveils Tesla's 'Cybercab,' plans to bring autonomous driving tech to other models in 2025
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Tesla unveiled its long-awaited robotaxi at a Hollywood studio Thursday night, though fans of the electric vehicle maker will have to wait until at least 2026 before they are available. CEO Elon Musk pulled up to a stage at the Warner Bros.
item.dc:creator: TOM KRISHER and ALEX VEIGA, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Pentagon releases final CMMC rule, paving way for implementation
item.description: The Pentagon has taken another big step forward to make CMMC a reality. DoD projects the requirements will start showing up in contracts by mid-2025. The post Pentagon releases final CMMC rule, paving way for implementation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: AI is killing cloud sustainability
item.description: Sustainability was once a highly touted advantage in public cloud computing. Enterprises and cloud providers flaunted their green initiatives, promoting data centers powered by renewable energy that would reduce carbon footprints. This topic has quietly slipped off the radar in recent months.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Ben Horowitz’s dual support for Trump and Harris says a lot about the Valley’s AI politics
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. I’m Mark Sullivan, a senior writer at Fast Company, covering emerging tech, AI, and tech policy.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: TypeScript 5.7 improves error reporting
item.description: TypeScript 5.7, the latest planned release of Microsoft’s JavaScript variant with syntax for types, is now available as a beta release. With the update, the language’s type system is now able to report errors when variables have never been initialized.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: North Carolina maker of high-purity quartz back operating post-Helene
item.description: One of the two companies that manufacture high-purity quartz used for making semiconductors from mines in a western North Carolina community harmed by Hurricane Helene is operating again.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: The inside story of Roku’s TV program
item.description: Ten years ago, streaming stick maker Roku released its first smart TVs in partnership with Hisense and TCL, two Chinese TV manufacturers that few had heard of in the U.S. at that time. In the years since, Roku has become the domestic smart TV market leader.
item.dc:creator: Janko Roettgers, Fast Company

item.title: This privacy and compliance threat throws shade at iPhone Mirroring
item.description: Apple-focused IT admins using device management software should perhaps temporarily disable iPhone Mirroring across their device fleets to prevent inadvertent privacy or compliance challenges as a result of using the new macOS Sequoia feature. (Apple is supposed to be working on a fix already.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Astera Labs debuts Scorpio fabric switch to accelerate PCIe for AI, cloud
item.description: There’s a new type of switch that could soon be showing up in AI-optimized data centers, a PCIe 6 fabric switch. Astera Labs this week unveiled its new Scorpio fabric switch, which it says is the industry’s first PCIe 6 switch.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft previews AI ‘building blocks’ for .NET
item.description: Microsoft is previewing packages geared to integrating generative AI services into .NET applications. Called Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Abstractions and Microsoft.Extensions.AI libraries, the packages are available in preview as of October 8.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How to use Java generics to avoid ClassCastExceptions
item.description: Generics are used in Java to allow types or methods to operate on objects of various types while providing compile-time type safety. Generics address the problem of ClassCastExceptions being thrown at runtime as a result of code that is not type safe.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Meta Expands AI-Powered Chatbot to 21 New Markets, Boosting Competition with OpenAI and Google
item.description: Meta announces expansion of Meta AI in 21 new markets, intensifying competition with OpenAI's ChatGPT and Google's Gemini
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: CISO의 새로운 무기 ‘리스크 스토리텔링’ 역량 개발법
item.description: 리스크 스토리텔링 능력은 조직 내 실질적 변화를 이끄는 핵심 요소다. 효과적인 스토리는 사이버 보안 리스크를 부각해 주의를 환기시키고, 최종적으로 구체적 행동을 유도한다. 칼라일그룹(Carlyle Group)의 CISO 베서니 드 루드는 “무엇이든 대화의 주제가 되면 우선순위로 올라가게 마련이다. 그래서 우리는 사이버 보안에 대해 대화해야 한다”라고 설명했다. 드 루드가 말하는 것은 단순한 기술적 통제에 관한 낡은 이야기가 아니다.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Here's what has made Hurricane Milton so fierce and unusual
item.description: With its mighty strength and its dangerous path, Hurricane Milton has powered into a very rare threat that is flirting with experts’ worst fears.
item.dc:creator: Seth Borenstein, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Twin boys born conjoined celebrate 1st birthday after separation surgery
item.description: Twin brothers who were born conjoined recently celebrated their first birthday after undergoing successful separation surgery.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: How to use your iPhone to get help by satellite
item.description: Apple’s decision to put satellite connections in iPhones is already saving lives, and as Hurricane Milton threatens Florida, now is the time for every US iPhone user to learn how the system works and why they should upgrade to iOS 18.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: American Water cyberattack renews focus on protecting critical infrastructure
item.description: CAMDEN, N.J. (AP) — A cyberattack continues to affect the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the United States, renewing a focus on the importance of protecting critical infrastructure sites.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SHIPKOWSKI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: US considers asking court to break up Google as it weighs remedies in the antitrust case
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice is considering asking a federal judge to break up Google after its ubiquitous search engine was declared an illegal monopoly, but it is just one of many possible remedies under review, according to a court filing.
item.dc:creator: SHAWN CHEN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Atlassian’s genAI assistant Rovo is now available
item.description: Atlassian’s Rovo generative AI (genAI) assistant, which launched as a preview release in May, is now available for users. The company bills Rovo as an “AI-powered” knowledge discovery tool that lets teams access information across their organization more efficiently.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Electron vs. Tauri: Which cross-platform framework is for you?
item.description: If there’s one thing developers agree on about cross-platform applications, it’s that it’s easier to create a GUI with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript than to use one of the many cross-platform frameworks out there. Frameworks like Electron give you the best of both worlds.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: iPhone update allows users to text for help when there's no cell service
item.description: The new update allows users to connect their phones to satellite, as long its an iPhone 14 or later model running iOS18.
item.dc:creator: Kaycee Sloan, NewsNation

item.title: TikTok is designed to be addictive to kids and causes them harm, US states' lawsuits say
item.description: More than a dozen states and the District of Columbia filed lawsuits against TikTok on Tuesday, saying that the popular short-form video app is designed to be addictive to kids and harms their mental health.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Rust resumes rise in popularity
item.description: Rust, the fast and memory-safe programming language born out of Mozilla, has resumed its rise up the monthly Tiobe index of programming language popularity, although it still has not cracked the index’s top 10.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The Titan's former lead engineer says he felt pressured to get the submersible ready
item.description: The lead engineer for an experimental submersible that imploded en route to the wreck of the Titanic testified Monday that he felt pressured to get the vessel ready to dive and refused to pilot it for a journey several years earlier.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK WHITTLE and LISA J. ADAMS WAGNER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: These are the 7 most devastating data breaches. Now what?
item.description: Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson: Data breaches in 2024 exposed info of millions, stressing the need for better cybersecurity.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Ask Kurt: How does Apple AirTag work, how far can you track?
item.description: Can you use an AirTag to track a pet? Is it worth it? Here’s how far it will track. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson discusses.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Advocacy groups suspend use of 'suicide capsule' pending Swiss criminal probe of woman's death
item.description: Advocacy groups behind a so-called suicide capsule said Sunday they have suspended the process of taking applications to use it — which numbered over 370 last month — as a criminal investigation into its first use in Switzerland is completed.
item.dc:creator: JAMEY KEATEN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: What to stream: Coldplay, an unhinged Charlie Puth, 'Salem’s Lot,' Sarah Paulson and NHL 25
item.description: Coldplay's 10th studio album and the American Music Awards celebrating their 50th anniversary are some of the new television, films, music and games headed to a device near you.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11
